fld_description: Natural cruise key in YYYY-MM-NODC form (e.g. 1998-02-33JD); primary key of cruise.
notes: public cross-dataset join key; derive via derive_cruise_key_on_casts().

fld_description: Stable UUID for a cruise (SWFSC source tables).
notes: internal to swfsc source; cruise_key is the public join key.

fld_description: NODC ship code key; primary key of ship.
NODC ship code.
Source ship code as provided by the data provider; resolve to ship_key.
Ship name as resolved against the NODC ship registry.
CalCOFI station key in 'line station' form (e.g. '090.0 062.0'); canonical spatial join key.
Stable UUID for a site occupation (SWFSC source).
CalCOFI grid-cell key; FK to grid. Assigned spatially via assign_grid_key().
Bottle/CTD cast identifier; primary key of casts.
Natural cast key.
Niskin bottle identifier; primary key of bottle.
Stable UUID for a plankton net sample (SWFSC source).
Stable UUID for a net tow (SWFSC source).
Sequential tow number within an occupation.
Net-tow identifier (source integer counter); primary key of a tow table.
notes: use where the source provides a stable integer rather than a UUID (cf. tow_uuid).

fld_description: Order of station occupation within a cruise.
Latitude in decimal degrees, WGS84 (EPSG:4326).
notes: canonical over lat_dec; maps to DwC decimalLatitude on publish.

fld_description: Longitude in decimal degrees, WGS84 (EPSG:4326).
notes: canonical over lon_dec; maps to DwC decimalLongitude on publish.

fld_description: Alongshore component of the CalCOFI coordinate system (https://proj.org/en/stable/operations/projections/calcofi.html).
notes: numeric; site_key encodes line+station as text. bottle keeps rpt_/st_/ac_ line variants distinct.

fld_description: Offshore component of the CalCOFI coordinate system (https://proj.org/en/stable/operations/projections/calcofi.html).
notes: numeric; bottle keeps rpt_/st_/ac_ sta variants distinct.

fld_description: Sampling depth below surface, in meters.
Seafloor (bottom) depth, in meters.
Feature geometry in WGS84 (EPSG:4326).
Observation (or sampling-event start) date-time in UTC. For instantaneous samples this is the sample time; for tows/casts it is the start.
notes: canonical event timestamp; derive from source date+time or Y/M/D + time components. used by match_by_site_datetime().

fld_description: Sampling-event end date-time in UTC (datetime_start_utc holds the start); e.g. net-tow end.
Year-month of the cruise (first day of month).
CalCOFI species identifier; primary key of species.
Scientific (Latin) name of the taxon.
Common (vernacular) name of the taxon.
ITIS Taxonomic Serial Number (TSN) for the taxon.
WoRMS AphiaID for the taxon.
Life stage of the organism (e.g. egg, yolk-sac larva).
notes: harmonize categorical values across datasets; ichthyo currently ships numeric stage.

fld_description: Type of measurement; FK to measurement_type. Vocabulary in metadata/measurement_type.csv.
Numeric value of the measurement; units carried by measurement_type, not here.
Quality flag or comment for the measurement.
Mean of replicate measurements at a unique position (site_key+datetime+depth+type).
Sample standard deviation of replicates; 0 when n_obs = 1.
Number of replicate observations aggregated.
Raw count of individuals.
Standard haul factor for abundance standardization.
Volume of water filtered/sampled.
Dataset identifier = provider_dataset (e.g. swfsc_ichthyo). FK to dataset.dataset_key; stamped on every observation via the v_obs_* views.
Global taxon key: lowercase authority prefix + id (worms:<worms_id>, or itis:<itis_id> for birds/Aves). Primary key of taxon; FK from obs/obs_attribute/dataset_taxon/taxon_group.
Per-dataset taxon key: <dataset-or-known-list>:<local id> (e.g. calcofi:19). Primary key of dataset_taxon.
Taxon grouping key: <dataset-or-known-list>:<group> (e.g. calcofi:seabirds). Primary key of taxon_group (many taxon_key per group).
WoRMS-lineage parent of a taxon (self-FK into taxon.taxon_key); nullable.
GBIF backbone taxon id for the taxon (nullable).
NCBI Taxonomy id for the taxon (placeholder; nullable).
iNaturalist taxon id for the taxon (placeholder; nullable).
